en: Weather in the north: Sun and frost replace storms after Easter. While it initially remains stormy on Easter Monday, the wind decreases in the new week. Sun and frost will alternate in the coming days.
la: Tempestas in aquilone : Sol et gelu succedunt tempestates post Pascha. Dum initio tempestatis die Lunae Paschatis manet, ventus in nova septimana decrescit. Sol et frigora alternis venientibus diebus erunt.
